% auto-generated by scripts/p21_training_cost.py -- do not hand-edit
% Wall-clock on a SHARED GPU: the estimator is the minimum over identical
% reruns, applied to catalogue and joint alike, because contention only ever
% adds time. A per-regime median put two contended runs (S, LS) into the
% numerator while the joint denominator stayed clean, and read 6.3x.
\newcommand{\SpecHours}{3.5}  % GPU-hours to train ONE specialist (median over the 8 per-regime clean runs)
\newcommand{\JointHours}{6.1}  % GPU-hours to train the one joint policy
\newcommand{\CatalogueHours}{24}  % GPU-hours for the 7-specialist catalogue
\newcommand{\CatalogueVsJointX}{3.9}  % catalogue / joint, in training hours
\newcommand{\TrainContendX}{3.9}  % worst wall-clock spread across reruns of ONE identical config
